page_metadata.biotools__summary: BIANCA (Brain Intensity AbNormality Classification Algorithm) is a fully automated, supervised method for white matter hyperintensities detection, based on the k-nearest neighbour (k-NN) algorithm.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BIANCA (Brain Intensity AbNormality Classification Algorithm) is a fully automated, supervised method for white matter hyperintensities detection, based on the k-nearest neighbour (k-NN) algorithm.
